words.meaning_en: To make something bad or unsatisfactory better

one_word_sub.question: A person or nation engaged in war or conflict

words.example_sentence_hi: एक मिलनसार व्यक्ति जहाँ भी जाता है दोस्त बना लेता है।

words.example_sentence_hi: वह नौकरी का प्रस्ताव स्वीकार करने और अपने गृहनगर में रहने के बीच डगमगाती रही।

words.meaning_en: Calmness and composure, especially in difficult situations

one_word_sub.question: To make an already bad problem or situation worse

words.sentence: Delay in relief ______ the suffering of the flood victims.

words.meaning_en: Silly and pointless; showing a lack of intelligence

words.example_sentence: The defence lawyer tried to impugn the credibility of the witness.

words.example_sentence: He is an inveterate gambler who cannot resist the urge to bet.

words.example_sentence_hi: वह एक पक्का जुआरी है जो दाँव लगाने के आग्रह को रोक नहीं सकता।

words.example_sentence: The loquacious presenter never let anyone else speak.

words.example_sentence: His mercurial temperament made him difficult to work with.

words.sentence: Nothing could ______ the protesters who demanded justice.

words.example_sentence: The pamphlet was a polemic against the corrupt government.

words.example_sentence_hi: सरकार ने राहत उपायों की घोषणा करके प्रदर्शनकारियों को शांत करने की कोशिश की।

one_word_sub.question: A person who is diligent and works with great care

one_word_sub.question: Extremely bold or daring in action or thought

words.example_sentence: Critics dismissed the film's plot as banal and predictable.

one_word_sub.question: A nation or person who is hostile and eager to fight

words.example_sentence: The benevolent donor funded scholarships for hundreds of underprivileged students.

one_word_sub.question: A person who is kind and wishes good to others

one_word_sub.question: Something done openly without any attempt to hide it
